appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/validation/** to ESLint ignores to resolve known pre-existing parse error for generated validation files outside tsconfig scope (documented in AGENTS.md as infrastructure noise)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update mors-global-worker SKILL.md 'When to Use' milestone list to include misc-hardening and any future ad-hoc milestone names, or switch to an open-ended pattern (e.g., 'any implementation feature assigned to this skill') to avoid stale enumeration.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: features.json assigns misc-hardening-3-native-auth-polish to skillName=mors-global-worker, but .factory/skills/mors-global-worker/SKILL.md:12 lists only relay-foundation/global-async-messaging/realtime-watch/developer-launch-path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that the 3100-3109 port-range constraint applies to services that bind/listen, not to fake/non-bound relay URLs used in negative-path tests (e.g., randomized high ports for no-server prerequisite tests).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md:7 says 'Use only local ports in the 3100-3109 range for new services.' test/relay/cli-encrypted-remote.test.ts uses noServerPort=39_999+random for non-bound fake relay URLs. The distinction between bound service ports and non-bound test URLs is not explicit.
